programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol 12 Compilations
programme.desc: Dr. Pol's team helps patients in critical condition and makes urgent appointments.Veterinarians are ready to intervene in difficult cases, 24 hours a day, seven days a week.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol 12 Compilations
programme.desc: Dr. Pol's team helps patients in critical condition and makes urgent appointments.Veterinarians are ready to intervene in difficult cases, 24 hours a day, seven days a week.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol 24
programme.desc: Veterinarian Jan Pol, using his many years of experience, helps all types of animals.Every day he is accompanied by his family and closest friends.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol 24
programme.desc: Veterinarian Jan Pol, using his many years of experience, helps all types of animals.Every day he is accompanied by his family and closest friends.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: Charles decided to fulfill his dream of having a farm.Beth, his brother-in-law Ben and Dr. Pol help him with the project.We will accompany them at all stages of their business.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: Charles decided to fulfill his dream of having a farm.Beth, his brother-in-law Ben and Dr. Pol help him with the project.We will accompany them at all stages of their business.

programme.title: Untamed Americas
programme.desc: The territory of North and South America stretches over 15,000 kilometers - from the Arctic Archipelago to Tierra del Fuego.No other continent has such breadth and diversity of landscape.Here you can admire the longest mountain chain in the world - the Andes, the Amazon rainforest and the driest area on Earth - the Atacama Desert.Unique species of animals live in these wild areas.The authors hunt grizzly bears, encounter bats with extremely long tongues, jaguars attacking caimans and dolphins swimming among the trees.From cold Alaska, through the tropical Caribbean and the green Amazon - famous actor Josh Brolin takes viewers on this amazing journey.

programme.title: Europe From Above 2
programme.desc: Continuation of the sky expedition over the Old Continent.In the second series you will be able to admire, among others:the Greek Acropolis or the great icebreakers in Finland.

programme.title: Dr K's Exotic Animal ER 3
programme.desc: Pixel, an eight-year-old miniature rabbit, has digestive problems.Dr. K says it's an intestinal problem and orders a CT scan to determine the cause of the bloating.Webster, a 29-year-old common macaw, suffers from visual impairment.According to the doctor, she will need surgery.The parrot comes under the care of Dr.Carastro.He undergoes a specialist eyeball examination.Unfortunately, it turns out that the parrot's eye has to be removed.9.5-year-old Pickles, an Egyptian Uromastyx, goes for a check-up with Dr. T. Two weeks earlier, the lizard was very lethargic and its condition was diagnosed as serious.

programme.title: Critter Fixers: Country Vet: Appreciation Compilation 2023
Animal Fight Club
programme.desc: There is a constant struggle in the animal kingdom.Lions, elephants, polar bears and cobras engage in deadly fights.The cameras capture scenes full of tension, drama and determination.Each fight has a story behind it.An alligator boldly wanting to assert its dominance, a hungry bear fighting for food, or a fox taking part in a mating ritual - they will show their capabilities.Unique recordings show the colorful and cruel world of animals.Tactics, hidden weapons, deception - wild creatures use all possibilities and will stop at nothing to survive.

programme.title: Untamed Americas
programme.desc: The territory of North and South America stretches over 15,000 kilometers - from the Arctic Archipelago to Tierra del Fuego.No other continent has such breadth and diversity of landscape.Here you can admire the longest mountain chain in the world - the Andes, the Amazon rainforest and the driest area on Earth - the Atacama Desert.Unique species of animals live in these wild areas.The authors hunt grizzly bears, encounter bats with extremely long tongues, jaguars attacking caimans and dolphins swimming among the trees.From cold Alaska, through the tropical Caribbean and the green Amazon - famous actor Josh Brolin takes viewers on this amazing journey.

programme.title: Europe From Above 2
programme.desc: Continuation of the sky expedition over the Old Continent.In the second series you will be able to admire, among others:the Greek Acropolis or the great icebreakers in Finland.

programme.title: Dr K's Exotic Animal ER 3
programme.desc: Shiloh is a six-month-old female Belgian Giant rabbit.The animal comes to the clinic in very bad condition.He is lethargic and doesn't want to drink or eat.Dr. Thielen suspects an ear infection.Clover's red-winged buzzard also has problems with eating.Doctor K notices he has symptoms of anemia.He takes every step to save the noble bird.The third to arrive at the clinic is Quilson, a one-and-a-half-year-old white-bellied afro hedgehog with a growth on his paw.The vet suspects that the animal may also suffer from a neurological disease.Doctor K prepares a treatment plan.

programme.title: Wild Yellowstone
programme.desc: As summer arrives, Yellowstone turns into a wildlife paradise.However, this vibrant place also has its cruel side.Grizzlies emerge from their dens in the mountains and head into the valleys in search of food.They wander among wonderful wild nature, which is also the arena of a brutal fight for survival.From spring floods to blazing August sun, summer in Yellowstone is changeable, full of challenges and opportunities.We will see exciting fights and dramas: predators on the hunt, animals protecting their young, grizzlies fighting wolves and Clark's salmon avoiding dangerous Canadian otters and ospreys.

programme.title: Predator Fails
programme.desc: Lions, panthers and other predators arouse admiration as reliable hunters.However, hunting down prey requires a lot of effort from them.Very often, their search for prey ends in failure, which means hunger.Viewers will see how the most famous hunters in the animal world cope.They will learn how strength, speed, strategy and teamwork make predators successful in chasing, fighting and killing.They will see the difference between ocean hunters and forest hunters and savannah kings.The creators of the series show how poisonous venom, sharp claws and huge mouths are used.They also present survival strategies for potential victims, who often manage to escape the predator.

programme.title: Venom Files - Anatomy of a Snake Bite
programme.desc: Millions of people fall victim to bites every year.Viewers will learn about deadly snake species and the mechanism of action of their toxins.They will see how reptiles use their deadly weapons.

programme.title: Alaska's Grizzly Gauntlet
programme.desc: Prince William Sound is home to black bears.Three thousand individuals live there, and over 100,000 in the entire territory of Alaska.Survivalist Les Stroud will take a closer look at them, and what's more, he will come face to face with them.However, before he decides to meet, he must learn more about the habits of the subjects of his research.He will be helped by someone who knows everything about the local flora and fauna.Stroud's guide spent decades observing black bears.Thanks to it, the traveler will learn what dangers he may encounter after crossing the borders of the kingdom of these predators.The expedition begins when they are preparing for the arrival of winter.They need to increase their weight because the additional protective layer is useful in hostile weather conditions.Bears are looking for food, but if they choose the wrong place, they are in serious danger.First of all, they must be vigilant - every rustle means that an unwanted companion has appeared.Viewers will see how predators deal with them.It is also worth mentioning that these animals want to be left in peace wherever they are.This is why Stroud does not enter their lairs, because a confrontation may prove painful.

programme.title: Australia's Land of the Ancients
programme.desc: Northeast Australia is the most biodiverse region on the continent.Viewers will learn about the saltwater crocodile and the habits of cassowaries.They will also witness the pageboy's metamorphosis.

programme.title: Croatia's Coast
programme.desc: The Croatian coast, with over 1,200 islands, is home to many wild species, but there are noticeable changes.The document presents how rising sea temperatures affect fauna.

programme.title: Animal Fight Club
programme.desc: There is a constant struggle in the animal kingdom.Lions, elephants, polar bears and cobras engage in deadly fights.The cameras capture scenes full of tension, drama and determination.Each fight has a story behind it.An alligator boldly wanting to assert its dominance, a hungry bear fighting for food, or a fox taking part in a mating ritual - they will show their capabilities.Unique recordings show the colorful and cruel world of animals.Tactics, hidden weapons, deception - wild creatures use all possibilities and will stop at nothing to survive.

programme.desc: Dr. Pol's team helps patients in critical condition and makes urgent appointments.Veterinarians are ready to intervene in difficult cases, 24 hours a day, seven days a week.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: Charles decided to fulfill his dream of having a farm.Beth, his brother-in-law Ben and Dr. Pol help him with the project.We will accompany them at all stages of their business.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: Charles decided to fulfill his dream of having a farm.Beth, his brother-in-law Ben and Dr. Pol help him with the project.We will accompany them at all stages of their business.

programme.title: Untamed Americas
programme.desc: The territory of North and South America stretches over 15,000 kilometers - from the Arctic Archipelago to Tierra del Fuego.No other continent has such breadth and diversity of landscape.Here you can admire the longest mountain chain in the world - the Andes, the Amazon rainforest and the driest area on Earth - the Atacama Desert.Unique species of animals live in these wild areas.The authors hunt grizzly bears, encounter bats with extremely long tongues, jaguars attacking caimans and dolphins swimming among the trees.From cold Alaska, through the tropical Caribbean and the green Amazon - famous actor Josh Brolin takes viewers on this amazing journey.

programme.title: Europe From Above 2
programme.desc: Continuation of the sky expedition over the Old Continent.In the second series you will be able to admire, among others:the Greek Acropolis or the great icebreakers in Finland.

programme.title: Dr K's Exotic Animal ER 3
programme.desc: Shiloh is a six-month-old female Belgian Giant rabbit.The animal comes to the clinic in very bad condition.He is lethargic and doesn't want to drink or eat.Dr. Thielen suspects an ear infection.Clover's red-winged buzzard also has problems with eating.Doctor K notices he has symptoms of anemia.He takes every step to save the noble bird.The third to arrive at the clinic is Quilson, a one-and-a-half-year-old white-bellied afro hedgehog with a growth on his paw.The vet suspects that the animal may also suffer from a neurological disease.Doctor K prepares a treatment plan.

programme.title: Wild Yellowstone
programme.desc: As summer arrives, Yellowstone turns into a wildlife paradise.However, this vibrant place also has its cruel side.Grizzlies emerge from their dens in the mountains and head into the valleys in search of food.They wander among wonderful wild nature, which is also the arena of a brutal fight for survival.From spring floods to blazing August sun, summer in Yellowstone is changeable, full of challenges and opportunities.We will see exciting fights and dramas: predators on the hunt, animals protecting their young, grizzlies fighting wolves and Clark's salmon avoiding dangerous Canadian otters and ospreys.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol 9
programme.desc: Dr. Pol has been treating animals for many years.He saved the life of more than one animal.He is helped every day by his colleagues who are willing to make sacrifices.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol 9
programme.desc: Dr. Pol has been treating animals for many years.He saved the life of more than one animal.He is helped every day by his colleagues who are willing to make sacrifices.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol 9
programme.desc: Dr. Pol has been treating animals for many years.He saved the life of more than one animal.He is helped every day by his colleagues who are willing to make sacrifices.

programme.title: America The Beautiful: Wild Frontier
programme.desc: A documentary series devoted to the American border and its nature.The program presents the legends of the Wild West, which are intertwined with stories about local animal species.

programme.title: Critter Fixers: Country Vets: Compilation Season 2
Secrets of the Penguins
programme.desc: For two years, National Geographic explorer Bertie Gregory closely studied the tight-knit communities of some of the world's most intelligent penguins.He documented behaviors and situations that had previously been difficult to capture on camera.The series proves that penguins are much closer to humans than was previously known.These unique flightless birds are brave and adventurous, and at the same time value family bonds and friendship.Thanks to their ingenuity, they can survive in the most extreme conditions 20 years have passed since the premiere of the Oscar-winning "March of the Penguins".The three-part documentary series rediscovers the world of the inhabitants of the most hostile regions of the world.Today, groundbreaking technologies and scientific work allow us to look at flightless birds from a previously unavailable perspective.One of the guides to the penguin kingdom is Bertie Gregory, who camped with the team near the emperor penguin colony in Antarctica.The superhuman effort resulted in the recording of scenes that humans had never seen before.The most important thing is family. The first heroes of the bird saga are the largest representatives of the family - emperor penguins.For the first time, a television crew recorded an astonishing acrobatic display with their participation: hundreds of chicks of this species jumping from a 50-meter cliff into the icy ocean.Researchers also looked at the bonds between families, friends and strangers.In extreme conditions, social skills mean the difference between life and death.The cameras also included rockhopper, gentoo and golden-crested penguins.Filmmakers have discovered surprising behaviors of animals that can cooperate, take risks and even rebel.

programme.title: Secrets of the Octopus
programme.desc: We discover eight different species of octopuses in the depths of the sea.Each has a unique personality and great intelligence.Despite drastic differences, these animals turn out to be surprisingly similar to humans.

programme.title: Wonders of The Ocean
programme.desc: The Pacific Ocean is the largest and deepest body of water on Earth.Viewers will see the amazing creatures that inhabit its waters.Their lives are constantly threatened by deep-sea predators.

programme.title: Wonders of The Ocean
programme.desc: The Pacific Ocean is the largest and deepest body of water on Earth.Viewers will see the amazing creatures that inhabit its waters.Their lives are constantly threatened by deep-sea predators.

programme.title: Asia's Killer Hornets
programme.desc: Each colony of Asian hornets comes from a single queen.It abandons its swarm to create another one.He chooses an empty place to transform into a bustling army of ruthless killers.

programme.title: Europe From Above 2
programme.desc: Continuation of the sky expedition over the Old Continent.In the second series you will be able to admire, among others:the Greek Acropolis or the great icebreakers in Finland.
